message:
Simplify release title to 'Tenzir Documentation'

Remove redundant header from body since title is now descriptive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,10 +72,8 @@ jobs:
         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
           tag_name: latest
-          name: Documentation (latest)
+          name: Tenzir Documentation
           body: |
-            📚 **Tenzir Documentation Bundle**
-
             The complete docs in AI-friendly formats.
 
             **Downloads:**
